title: Entity Hover Information
description: Entity Hover Information displays an entity’s model, health, and armor when you hover your crosshair over it, providing quick, unobtrusive information at a glance.
body:
Entity Hover Information is a quality-of-life Minecraft mod designed to give players instant access to essential entity data without disrupting gameplay. When you aim your crosshair at an entity, the mod uses a raycast-based detection system to display a clean, unobtrusive overlay with useful information.

![Zombie Information on Hover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3PLM2LUg/images/e08044a3e9e6d6e39f93f9dc6fc6310cc9705ad0.png)

The overlay includes a preview of the entity’s model, its current and maximum health, and its armor values, all updated in real time. This allows you to quickly assess the strength and status of mobs, animals, or other entities without opening debug screens, using commands, or installing heavy UI mods.

Built to be lightweight and performance-friendly, Entity Hover Information integrates seamlessly into normal gameplay and is ideal for survival, modded, or technical playthroughs where quick decision-making matters. It enhances situational awareness while keeping the screen clear and the experience immersive.
